overall.description: A nighttime elevated monorail journey through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing dense neon advertisements, towering holographic displays, and glass skyscrapers. The camera moves smoothly along elevated tracks, revealing the vibrant, artificial-lit cityscape and streets below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train corridor between dark office buildings

events.description: passing bright teal illuminated office windows creating cyan reflections
exiting enclosed building corridor into open intersection view

agents.ego_description: riding an elevated train through a narrow corridor between buildings, passing the Lizzy Wizzy bar sign and employment advertisements

entered.detail: illuminated sign for Lizzy Wizzy Bar with stylized text and graphics
modern glass building with teal-lit interior windows
vertical billboard displaying NEW JOB? GET AN UPGRADE! with cybernetic imagery

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow enclosed corridor between dark buildings, prominently featuring the Lizzy Wizzy Bar sign. The train passes teal-lit office windows before emerging toward an open intersection, with the lighting shifting from dark shadows to brighter neon reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated view of major city intersection with dense digital billboards

events.description: opening into wide urban intersection with visible street traffic and crosswalks
vehicles moving through intersection below as traffic lights change

agents.ego_description: overlooking a busy intersection from the elevated train, observing sparse traffic and pedestrians crossing below

entered.detail: large digital billboard for EL GUAPO with animal imagery
tall modern skyscraper with illuminated windows
multi-lane road intersection with traffic signals and crosswalks

segments.scene_description: The train emerges into a wide-open intersection view, revealing the bustling street below with moving vehicles and scattered pedestrians. The EL GUAPO billboard dominates the right side while glass towers rise in the distance, creating a sense of vertical urban density.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated track alongside police department advertisements and holographic displays

events.description: large pink neural hologram structure appears on left side of track
passing Night City Police Department billboard and entering narrower building corridor

agents.ego_description: riding past political campaign posters and police advertisements in an enclosed urban canyon with holographic displays

entered.detail: massive circular pink holographic display showing neural network patterns
red political campaign poster with VOTE FOR PERALEZ text
billboard for Night City Police Department with MEET YOUR NEIGHBORS text
vertical illuminated ad for CREASER with portrait imagery

segments.scene_description: The train passes a massive pink neural hologram on the left while moving through a more enclosed corridor. Political and police advertisements line the route, with the VOTE FOR PERALEZ poster and Night City Police Department billboard prominently displayed against concrete building walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial billboard district with descending track approach

events.description: bright red Wide Open neon sign becomes visible on left building facade
train begins descending curve toward street level or station platform

agents.ego_description: continuing through dense advertisement corridor, approaching street level with visible pedestrians and parked vehicles below

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading Wide Open with graphic elements
colorful billboard for School of the Streets with EXPLORING THE TASTE text
vertical sign with Japanese text for ramen shop

segments.scene_description: The final segment features dense commercial advertising including the prominent red Wide Open neon sign and School of the Streets billboard. The train appears to descend toward street level, revealing parked vehicles and pedestrians while surrounded by towering digital advertisements on all sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense cyberpunk corridor that transitions from narrow, shadowed alleys into a wide-open urban intersection before descending back into a canyon of commercial advertisements. It begins in a tight space between dark buildings, passing the Lizzy Wizzy Bar sign and teal-lit office windows before emerging into a bright, open intersection. As the view expands, the camera reveals bustling streets with moving vehicles and pedestrians below, dominated by a massive EL GUAPO billboard and distant glass towers. The scene then shifts back into a more enclosed route, gliding past a towering pink neural hologram and political posters for Peralez and the Night City Police Department. Finally, the train descends toward street level, surrounded by a dense cluster of digital displays including the red Wide Open neon sign and the School of the Streets billboard.
